description_long: This is a young child with a medium build, standing with arms slightly outstretched to the sides. The child has short, straight hair and is dressed in a short-sleeve shirt and knee-length shorts, paired with athletic sneakers. The facial features are soft and youthful, and the proportions are consistent with a pre-adolescent child. The clothing fits loosely, and the shoes are robust, suitable for active movement in urban environments. The overall appearance is casual and practical, with no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A young child standing with arms out, wearing a short-sleeve shirt, knee-length shorts, and sneakers, with short straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the child's face, short-sleeve shirt, shorts, and sneakers with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the arm's extension, and the side of the clothing and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, shorts, and both arms extended backward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side of the outfit and footwear.
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with a rounded shape
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
